SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class JmlAssertRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.JmlAssertRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
public final class JmlAssertRule extends Object implements BuiltInRule
A rule for JML assert/assume statements. This implements the rules as:

\DELTA => update(cond -> <.. ...>), \GAMMA -------------------------------------------------------- \DELTA => update(<.. //@assume cond; ...>), \GAMMA

and

\DELTA => update(cond), \GAMMA \DELTA => update(cond -> <.. ...>), \GAMMA --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- \DELTA => update(<.. //@assert cond; ...>), \GAMMA

  • Method Details

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence occurrence)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule
